claim_boundary: automated real-arithmetic cross-check (z3) of the certified-inequality schemas; an independent witness for the discharged Lean/Coq certificates, not a new physical claim

schemas.description: 0 <= extractable work W <= <H> - E0 (no free energy)
schemas.name: ergotropy

schemas.description: erasure cost >= k_B T ln 2 (info <-> energy)
schemas.name: landauer

schemas.description: S <= 2 pi R E (info <-> energy <-> geometry)
schemas.name: bekenstein

schemas.description: aliasing fold: fs/2 < f < fs => 0 < fs-f < fs/2
schemas.name: nyquist_aliasing

schemas.description: cos theta_c = 1/(n beta) valid: nb>=1, c*nb=1 => 0<c<=1
schemas.name: cherenkov_cone

schemas.description: linear light cone: vf<=vlr, t>=0 => vf*t<=vlr*t
schemas.name: lieb_robinson_lightcone
